scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,backend,frontend -c auto "npm -w @catalog/shared run dev" "npm -w backend run dev" "npm -w frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @catalog/shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.check: npm run check -w @catalog/shared && npm run check -w frontend && npm run check -w backend
scripts.docker:up: docker compose build backend && docker compose build frontend && docker compose up -d
